Off Calendar Nov-27-2012 Continued To Nov-30-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Celine Mui Simon (415-597-7816) of French & Lyon for Fremont Bank, plaintiff and moving party / William Abbott (415-863-9337) of Law Ofices of William Abbott for La Shon Annette Walker, defendant and opposing party

The tentative ruling is modified as follows: Parties are working to resovle matter and intend to present stipulation to the Court prior to the hearing date and the matter will go off calender. PLAINTIFF FREMONT BANK's Motion For Appointment Of Receiver, And Preliminary Injunction is continued to November 30, 2012. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (D501)
